task_completion.description: Verify the taxpayer profile is set up for David Ross with the correct personal details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax personal information screen or wizard showing the name 'David Ross', province 'Ontario', marital status 'Single', and date of birth 'Jan 15, 1982'.

task_completion.description: Verify the T4 slip is entered with the retroactive pay amount in Box 89.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax T4 data entry screen showing a T4 slip for David Ross with a value entered in Box 89.

task_completion.description: Verify the T4E slip is entered showing the CERB overpayment repayment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax T4E data entry screen showing a $2,000 repayment amount (typically in Box 30).

task_completion.description: Verify Form T1198 is completed for the qualifying retroactive lump-sum payment.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax forms view showing Form T1198 filled out with the $24,000 retroactive pay distributed across the years 2021-2023.

task_completion.description: Verify the $2,000 benefit repayment is claimed as a deduction on Line 23200.
task_completion.visual_evidence: StudioTax T1 General form or deductions summary screen showing a $2,000 deduction on Line 23200 (Other deductions).

task_completion.description: Verify the completed return is saved with the correct filename in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog box or file explorer window showing 'david_ross.24t' being saved in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\', or the StudioTax title bar displaying this file path.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the StudioTax 2024 graphical user interface to complete the tax return.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the StudioTax 2024 application window being actively clicked and typed into, rather than terminal commands or scripts generating the .24t file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent opened and read the provided tax documents.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a PDF viewer or image viewer opening the T4, T4E, and retroactive pay breakdown letter from 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\ross\'.

integrity.description: Verify the output file is a genuine StudioTax file and not a spoofed text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file 'david_ross.24t' should be saved through the StudioTax 'Save' functionality, not created using Notepad or a terminal text editor.
